hero.title: Phendula Ividiyo Eyodwa Ibe
hero.subtitle: Namathisela isixhumanisi se-YouTube. Layisha i-podcast. Lahla umbhalo oqoshiwe.
hero.accent: I-ailomo idala ngokushesha okuqukethwe okucwengekile kuyo yonke inkundla.
hero.placeholder: Namathisela isixhumanisi se-YouTube, i-podcast URL, noma noma iyiphi ividiyo...
hero.fileDropSubtitle: MP3, WAV, MP4, MOV — kufika ku-500MB
hero.textPlaceholder: Namathisela umbhalo wakho oqoshiwe noma umbhalo — i-AI iyawuguqula ibe okuqukethwe okulungele inkundla...

steps.title: Namathisela noma Layisha
steps.desc: Lahla isixhumanisi se-YouTube, layisha ifayela lomsindo, noma namathisela umbhalo. Akukho ukumiswa.

steps.title: I-AI Iyawuguqula
steps.desc: Okuqukethwe kwakho kuyabhala, kuqondwe, futhi kubhalwe kabusha ngezwi eliyingqayizivele lenkundla ngayinye.

steps.title: Shicilela Yonke Indawo
steps.desc: Thola okuthunyelwe kwebhulogi, imicu yezenhlalo, izincwadi zezindaba, nokuningi. Kopisha, landa, kwenziwe.

items.title: Akukhona nje Ukubhala
items.desc: I-AI yethu ihlaziya umongo, ikhipha imininingwane, futhi ikhiqiza okuqukethwe okulungiselelwe izethameli zenkundla ngayinye.

items.title: Ukuchofoza Kanye, Yonke Inkundla
items.desc: Wonke amafomethi ayi-10 akhiqizwa ngasikhathi sinye. Kusukela kumabhulogi amade kuya emiculweni yezenhlalo — konke kulungele ngemizuzwana.

items.title: Xoxa Nokuqukethwe Kwakho
items.desc: Yonke into ekhiphayo inengxoxo ye-AI eyakhelwe ngaphakathi. "Engeza eminye imininingwane", "yenza kube mnandi" — izinguquko zisetshenziswa ngokushesha.

features.label: Izici
features.title: Konke Ukuze
features.subtitle: Yakhelwe abadali abaphendula yonke ingxenye yokuqukethwe ibe umthelela omkhulu.

list.title: Ukubhala Kabusha Okunamandla yi-AI
list.desc: Akukhona nje ukubhala — i-AI yethu iqonda umongo futhi ibhale kabusha ngezwi eliyingqayizivele lenkundla ngayinye.

list.title: Amafomethi Okuphuma Ayi-10
list.desc: Okuthunyelwe kwebhulogi, imicu ye-Twitter, i-LinkedIn, i-Xiaohongshu, izincwadi zezindaba, ama-SRT subtitles, izihloko ze-SEO, nokuningi.

list.title: Izilimi Ezingaphezu Kwama-63
list.desc: Bhala futhi ukhiqize ngezilimi ezingaphezu kwama-63. Yakhelwe abadali bamazwe ngamazwe.

list.title: Ukukhiqiza Okusakazwayo
list.desc: Okuqukethwe kuvela uhlamvu ngohlamvu ngesikhathi sangempela. Akukho ukulinda izipina.

list.title: Ukucwengwa Okuxoxisanayo
list.desc: Xoxa nokuphumayo ngakunye ukuze ukuhlele kahle. "Yenza kube mfushane" — kwenziwe.

list.title: Amafomethi Okuphuma Ayi-6
list.desc: I-Markdown, TXT, PDF, DOCX, SRT, CSV. Ilungele ukushicilelwa ngokushesha.

list.title: Yabelana & Sebenzisana
list.desc: Khiqiza izixhumanisi zozakwenu ukuze babuke futhi basebenzisane ngokuqukethwe kwenu.

list.title: Kuyimfihlo & Kuphephile
list.desc: Amafayela ayasuswa ngemva kokucubungula. Okuqukethwe kwakho akusetshenziselwa ukuqeqesha.

list.title: Ukutholwa Okuhlakaniphile
list.desc: Isixhumanisi se-YouTube? → Ibhulogi + Twitter. I-Bilibili? → I-WeChat + Xiaohongshu. Okuzenzakalelayo.

formats.outputSubtitle: Khiqiza konke ngasikhathi sinye — akukho sidingo sokusebenzisa ithuluzi izikhathi eziningi.
formats.langSubtitle: Bhala futhi ukhiqize okuqukethwe ngezilimi ezingaphezu kwama-63. Kulungele abadali bamazwe ngamazwe nezethameli zomhlaba wonke.

testimonials.text: "Ekugcineni ithuluzi eliqonda ukusebenza kokudala okuqukethwe. Ividiyo eyodwa → zonke izinkundla ngemizuzu. Lishintsha umdlalo ohlelweni lwami lokuqukethwe."
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.text: "Ukucwengwa okuxoxisanayo kuhle kakhulu. Ngingakwazi ukulungisa okuphumayo ngakunye ngokuxoxa nakho. Kungisindisa amahora amaningi ngeviki."
testimonials.author: Marcus Rivera

testimonials.text: "Nganginokungabaza mayelana nokuqukethwe kwe-AI, kodwa ikhwalithi yangimangaza ngempela. Ukufometha okukhethekile kwenkundla kunembile."
testimonials.author: Yuki Tanaka

testimonials.text: "Njengomsunguli oyedwa, leli thuluzi linginikeza umphumela weqembu lokuqukethwe. Okuthunyelwe kwe-LinkedIn, amabhulogi, ama-tweets — konke kusuka kuvidiyo eyodwa."
testimonials.author: Alex Park

pricing.label: Izintengo
pricing.title: Izintengo Ezilula,
pricing.subtitle: Qala mahhala, thuthukisa lapho udinga okwengeziwe. Azikho izindleko ezifihliwe. Khansela noma nini.

cta.title: Ukulungele Uku
cta.subtitle: Joyina izinkulungwane zabadali abaphendula yonke ividiyo ibe isu eliphelele lokuqukethwe ezinkundleni eziningi. Qala mahhala — ayikho ikhadi lesikweletu elidingekayo.

items.a: Yebo! Uhlelo lwamahhala lukunikeza amavidiyo ama-3 ngenyanga namafomethi okuphuma ayi-5. Ayikho ikhadi lesikweletu elidingekayo.
Izilimi ezingaphezu kwama-63 zokubhala nokukhiqiza okuqukethwe.

items.q: Yiziphi izinkundla engingakwazi ukusebenzisa kabusha okuqukethwe kuzo?
items.a: I-WeChat, i-Xiaohongshu, i-Twitter/X, i-LinkedIn, amabhulogi, i-Medium, i-Substack, izincwadi zezindaba, nokuningi.
Amavidiyo amaningi acutshungulwa ngaphansi komzuzu owodwa. Okuqukethwe kusakazwa ngesikhathi sangempela.
Yebo! Xoxa nokuphumayo ngakunye ukuze ulungise ithoni, ubude, isitayela, noma ungeze izici.
Umsindo: MP3, WAV, M4A, FLAC, OGG. Ividiyo: MP4, MOV, MKV, WEBM.
Yebo. Amafayela ayasuswa ngemva kokucubungula. Awakaze asetshenziselwe ukuqeqesha.
Yebo, khansela noma nini. Azikho izinkontileka zesikhathi eside.

footer.tagline: Ukusetshenziswa kabusha kokuqukethwe okunamandla yi-AI. Phendula ividiyo eyodwa ibe isu lakho lonke lokuqukethwe ezinkundleni eziningi.

workbench.refinePlaceholder: Tshela i-AI ukuthi ilungise kanjani lokuqukethwe...
